zh.lifeSummary: 當Landolfo d'Aquino於1192年出生在義大利拉其福洛希農洛凱瑟卡卡斯特洛時，他的父親Aimone d'Aquino57歲，母親Francesca di Hohenstaufen55歲。他於1205年與Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno在義大利坎帕尼亞艾維利努洛加阿巴謝藍納結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1245年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Landolfo d'Aquino于1192年出生在意大利拉其福洛希農洛凱瑟卡卡斯特洛时，他的父亲Aimone d'Aquino57岁，母亲Francesca di Hohenstaufen55岁。他于1205年与Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno在意大利坎帕尼亞艾維利努洛加阿巴謝藍納结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1245年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aquino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Nicola, Stefano, Gaetano, Margherita, Nunzio, Sal, Salvatore.  Spanish Alba, Jose Alejandro, Pedro, Socorro.

Italian: habitational name for someone from a place called Aquino, of which there are several examples in Italy, but in particular the one in Lazio, birthplace of Saint Thomas Aquinas (see   Aquino  ).

variants.name: Aquino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Antonio, Pedro, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Josefina, Julio, Luis.  Portuguese Paulo, Catarina, Joao.  Italian Romeo, Luigi, Salvatore, Clemente, Leonardo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a Christian personal name bestowed in honor of Saint Thomas Aquinas (1225–74; Tommaso d'Aquino in Italian, Tomás de Aquino in Spanish), an Italian Dominican friar and Doctor of the Church. This surname is also common in the Philippines. See also 2 below, compare De Aquino .
Italian: habitational name from a place called Aquino (see   D'Aquino  ), the place where the theologian (see 1 above) was born.

nameMeanings.name: Landolfo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmelo, Carmine, Vito, Antonino, Antonio, Bartolo, Carlo, Carmela, Dante, Eduardo, Ricardo, Rosario.  Spanish Antonieta, Baldo, Carlos, Diego, Elena, Jorge, Mario, Raymondo.
Italian: from Gandolfo, an ancient Germanic personal name composed ofthe elements gand ‘spell’ + wulf ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Gandolfi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Giovanni, Attillo, Ettore, Geno, Gino, Larraine, Valentino.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Gandolfo  .

en.lifeSummary: When Landolfo d'Aquino was born in 1192, in Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italy, his father, Aimone d'Aquino, was 57 and his mother, Francesca di Hohenstaufen, was 55. He married Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno in 1205, in Roccabascerana, Avellino, Campania, Italy. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1245, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Landolfo d'Aquino est né en 1192, à Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italie, son père, Aimone d'Aquino, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Francesca di Hohenstaufen, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno en 1205, à Roccabascerana, Avellino, Campania, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1245, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Landolfo d'Aquino 1192 in Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aimone d'Aquino 57 und seine Mutter Francesca di Hohenstaufen 55. Er hat 1205 in Roccabascerana, Avellino, Campania, Italien Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Landolfo d'Aquino è nato il nel 1192 nel Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, il suo padre, Aimone d'Aquino, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Francesca di Hohenstaufen, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno nel 1205, nel Roccabascerana, Avellino, Campania, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1245, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Landolfo d'Aquinoが1192年にイタリアラズオフロシノンロクケイセクカカステロで生まれた時，父Aimone d'Aquinoは57歳，母Francesca di Hohenstaufenは55歳であった。1205年にイタリアカンプアニアエイベリノロクカバスセラナでTheodora Gallucio d'Invernoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1245年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Landolfo d'Aquino(이)가 1192년 이탈리아 라지오 프로시넌 록카세c카 카스텔로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aimone d'Aquino(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Francesca di Hohenstaufen(은)는 55세였다. 그는 1205년 이탈리아 캠파니아 에벨리노 록카바스서아나에서 Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Landolfo d'Aquino nasceu em 1192, em Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Itália, seu pai, Aimone d'Aquino, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Francesca di Hohenstaufen, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno em 1205, em Roccabascerana, Avellino, Campania, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1245, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Landolfo d'Aquino родился в 1192 г. в местности кастеллоу, роккеисекка, фросиноун, лазио, Италия, его отцу по имени Aimone d'Aquino было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Francesca di Hohenstaufen, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno в 1205 г. в местности роккабассирана, авеллино, кампаня, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1245 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Landolfo d'Aquino nació en 1192, en Castello, Roccasecca, Frosinone, Lazio, Italia, su papá, Aimone d'Aquino, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Francesca di Hohenstaufen, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Theodora Gallucio d'Inverno en 1205, en Roccabascerana, Avellino, Campania, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1245, a la edad de 53 años.
